member.name: T:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit
member.summary: The base class for TranslationUnit classes.

member.name: P:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.TranslationConfiguration
member.summary: Gets a reference to the configuration used when creating a unit.

member.name: P:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.TranslationManager
member.summary: Gets the reference to the translation manager, associated with this unit.

member.name: P:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.Key
member.summary: Gets the key of the translation unit, i.e., the identifier with which this unit appears in translation files.

member.name: P:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.ContainsPlaceholders
member.summary: Gets the value indicating whether the text of the unit contains placeholders, and the application has to provide values via the event or using the method.

member.name: E:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.OnPlaceholderValueNeeded
member.summary: Fires when the value for a placeholder is needed during the retrieval of the text.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValueAsTemplate(System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Returns the text of the template translation entry without processing the template. This may be useful when template processing is handled by the caller (e.g., when strings use .NET template format which is handled using the method or its overloads).
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValue
member.summary:
Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
This overload will use the cached values if those are available, or will fire the event to obtain the values.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary:
Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
This overload will use the cached values if those are available, or will fire the event to obtain the values.
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValue(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary:
Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
If is , , or , this overload will work for named placeholders. It will work for indexed placeholders if the values in the `placeholderValues` dictionary use indexes for keys.
member.param: A dictionary that contains placeholder names as keys and actual values to substitute as values.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary:
Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
If is , , or , this overload will work for named placeholders. It will work for indexed placeholders if the values in the `placeholderValues` dictionary use indexes for keys.
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.
A dictionary that contains placeholder names as keys and actual values to substitute as values.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValue(System.Collections.Specialized.OrderedDictionary)
member.summary:
Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
If is , , or , this overload will work for both named and indexed placeholders.
member.param: A dictionary that contains placeholder names as keys and actual values to substitute as values.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Collections.Specialized.OrderedDictionary)
member.summary:
Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
If is , , or , this overload will work for both named and indexed placeholders.
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.
a dictionary that contains placeholder names as keys and actual values to substitute as values.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValue(System.Object[])
member.summary:
Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
If is , , or , this overload will work for indexed placeholders but not for named ones.
member.param: a dictionary that contains placeholder names as keys and actual values to substitute as values.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Object[])
member.summary:
Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
If is , , or , this overload will work for indexed placeholders but not for named ones.
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.
a dictionary that contains placeholder names as keys and actual values to substitute as values.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValue(System.Object)
member.summary:
Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
If is , , or , this overload will work for named placeholders but not for indexed ones.
member.param: An object, whose properties are used to provide values for placeholders in the template. The names of the template's placeholders are matched with the object property names in a case-insensitive manner.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: is thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.GetValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Object)
member.summary:
Processes the templated translation entry by substituting the placeholders with actual values and returns the final text.
If is , , or , this overload will work for named placeholders but not for indexed ones.
member.param: The culture/locale for which the text is needed.

An object, whose properties are used to provide values for placeholders in the template. The names of the template's placeholders are matched with the object property names in a case-insensitive manner.
member.returns: The requested text or an empty string.
member.exception: is thrown if processing of the template fails.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.CachePlaceholderValue(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary:
Adds a value for the placeholder to the cache.
Call to notify the bindings after the list of values is upated.
member.param: The name of the value to cache.
The value to cache.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.ForgetPlaceholderValue(System.String)
member.summary:
Removes the value from the cache.
Call to notify the bindings after the list of values is upated.
member.param: The name of the placeholder, whose value is to be removed.

member.name: M:Tlumach.BaseTranslationUnit.NotifyPlaceholdersUpdated
member.summary:
Notifies XAML bindings that they need to request a new value and update the controls.
Use this method when underlying data changes regardless of whether you cache this data as values or pass it via the event.

member.name: T:Tlumach.CultureChangedEventArgs
member.summary: Contains the arguments of the CultureChanged event.

member.name: P:Tlumach.CultureChangedEventArgs.Culture
member.summary: The new value of the current culture of the sender.

member.name: T:Tlumach.FileContentNeededEventArgs
member.summary: Contains the arguments of the FileContentsNeeded event.

member.name: P:Tlumach.FileContentNeededEventArgs.Assembly
member.summary: An optional assembly from which the file is supposed to be loaded as known to the translation unit.

member.name: P:Tlumach.FileContentNeededEventArgs.Culture
member.summary: The culture, for which the file is needed.

member.name: P:Tlumach.FileContentNeededEventArgs.FileName
member.summary: The name of the default file as determined from the configuration and known to the translation unit.

member.name: P:Tlumach.FileContentNeededEventArgs.Content
member.summary: The placeholder for the content of the file. If it is set to any non-empty value, no attempt to load a file by other means will be done.

member.name: T:Tlumach.PlaceholderValueNeededEventArgs
member.summary: Contains the arguments of the ParameterValueNEeded event.

member.name: P:Tlumach.PlaceholderValueNeededEventArgs.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the placeholder whose value is requested.

member.name: P:Tlumach.PlaceholderValueNeededEventArgs.Index
member.summary: Gets the index of the placeholder whose value is requested. May be -1.

member.name: P:Tlumach.PlaceholderValueNeededEventArgs.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for the placeholder.

member.name: P:Tlumach.PlaceholderValueNeededEventArgs.CacheValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the indicator telling the unit that the value should be cached until further notification.

member.name: T:Tlumach.ReferenceNotResolvedEventArgs
member.summary: Contains the arguments of the ReferenceNotResolved event.

member.name: P:Tlumach.ReferenceNotResolvedEventArgs.Culture
member.summary: Gets a reference to the culture, for which the text is needed.

member.name: P:Tlumach.ReferenceNotResolvedEventArgs.Key
member.summary: Gets the key of the requested translation entry.

member.name: P:Tlumach.ReferenceNotResolvedEventArgs.Reference
member.summary: Gets the reference that has not been resolved.

member.name: P:Tlumach.ReferenceNotResolvedEventArgs.Text
member.summary: Should be set to the text value that corresponds to the specified Key and Culture.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationFileNotFoundEventArgs.Culture
member.summary: Gets a reference to the culture, for which the text is needed.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationFileNotFoundEventArgs.Translation
member.summary: Gets or sets a reference to the translation that should be used in place of the missing translation file.

member.name: T:Tlumach.TranslationManager
member.summary:
The core of Tlumach that manages translations, provides functions to enumerate translation files, and controls current language and locale used for translations.
Applications can use it to retrieve translation entries by their string key.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationManager.Empty
member.summary: Gets an instance of the class that is empty, not linked to any translations.

member.name: F:Tlumach.TranslationManager._translations
member.summary: A container for all translations managed by this class.

member.name: F:Tlumach.TranslationManager._defaultConfig
member.summary: The configuration to use for loading translations.

member.name: F:Tlumach.TranslationManager._defaultTranslation
member.summary: The default translation that is used as a fallback.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationManager.LoadFromDisk
member.summary: Gets or sets the indicator that tells TranslationManager to attempt to locate translation files on the disk.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationManager.TranslationsDirectory
member.summary:
Gets or sets the directory in which translations files are looked for.
When is disabled, this value is used when trying to load the translations from the assembly. When is enabled, this value is also used when trying to locate translation files on the disk.
This property is a hint for the manager, which affects loading of secondary translation files. When a configuration is loaded via the constructor, specify the directory in the name of the configuration file.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationManager.CurrentCulture
member.summary: Gets or sets the culture, which will be used by the method as a current culture.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationManager.CacheDefaultTranslations
member.summary:
Gets or sets the flag that specifies whether the translation manager should store values from the basic culture or default translation in locale-specific translations (in memory) for optimization as described further.
If a translation text is requested but not found in a locale-specific translation, it is searched in a basic culture translation and then in default culture. If an entry is found there, it may be stored in the locale-specific and basic culture translations; this is done depending on this property.
Caching makes sense in most cases unless you expect that the missing value may become available in the future (e.g., when files are loaded from the disk and you are translating your text to a new language and placing a file to the translation directory for verification in your application).

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationManager.DefaultConfiguration
member.summary: Gets the configuration used by this Translation Manager. May be empty if it was not set explicitly or by the generated class (when the Generator is used).

member.name: E:Tlumach.TranslationManager.OnFileContentNeeded
member.summary: The event is fired when the content of the file is to be loaded. A handler can provide file content from another location.

member.name: E:Tlumach.TranslationManager.OnTranslationFileNotFound
member.summary: The event is fired when the translation file for a given locale was looked for but not found. A handler can use a translation from a different non-default locale or otherwise substitute the translation.

member.name: E:Tlumach.TranslationManager.OnTranslationValueNeeded
member.summary: The event is fired when the translation of a certain key is requested. A handler can provide a different text or even a reference which will be resolved. If the returned values are valid and accepted (e.g., a reference is properly resolved), the value is returned without firing .

member.name: E:Tlumach.TranslationManager.OnTranslationValueFound
member.summary:
The event is fired after a translation of a certain key has been found in a file.
Should a handler need to provide a different value, it may change the text in the property or replace the reference in the property of the arguments.

member.name: E:Tlumach.TranslationManager.OnTranslationValueNotFound
member.summary:
The event is fired after a translation of a certain key has not been found in a file.
Should a handler decide to provide some value, it may set the text in the property or place a reference in the property of the arguments.

member.name: E:Tlumach.TranslationManager.OnReferenceNotResolved
member.summary:
The event is fired when a translation entry contains a reference to an external file that could not be resolved.
Should a handler decide to take the text from another place or provide an error message in place of the translation text, it may set the text in the property.

member.name: E:Tlumach.TranslationManager.OnCultureChanged
member.summary: The event is fired when the property is changed by the application. It is used primarily by the reactive classes in XAML packages (Tlumach.MAUI, Tlumach.Avalonia, Tlumach.WPF, Tlumach.WinUI).

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
This constructor creates a translation manager based on the configuration that is to be loaded from the disk file. Such translation manager can be used to simplify access to translations when translation units are not used - an application simply calls the GetValue method and species the key and, optionally, the culture.
member.param: The file with the configuration that specifies where to load translations from.
member.exception: Thrown if the parser for the specified configuration file is not found.
Thrown if the parser failed to load the configuration file.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.#ctor(System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
This constructor creates a translation manager based on the configuration that is to be loaded from the specified assembly. Such translation manager can be used to simplify access to translations when translation units are not used - an application simply calls the GetValue method and species the key and, optionally, the culture.
member.param: The reference to the assembly, from which the configuration file should be loaded.

The name of the file to load the configuration from. This name must include a subdirectory (if any) in resource format, such as "Translations.Data" if the original files' subdirectory is "Translations\Data" or "Translations/Data".
member.exception: Thrown if the parser for the specified configuration file is not found.
Thrown if the parser failed to load the configuration file.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.#ctor(Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
This constructor creates a translation manager based on the specified configuration. Such translation manager can be used to simplify access to translations when translation units are not used - an application simply calls the GetValue method and species the key and, optionally, the culture.
member.param: The configuration that specifies where to load translations from.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.ListCultures(System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String})
member.summary: From the list of available language files obtained using , retrieve culture information (needed for language names and to switch application language).
member.param: The list of names obtained from .
member.returns: The list of.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.LoadTranslation(System.String,System.String,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Nullable{Tlumach.Base.TextFormat})
member.summary: Loads the translation from the given text, choosing the parser based on the extension.
member.param: The text to load the translation from.
The extension of the file to use for choosing the parser.
An optional reference to the locale, whose translation is to be loaded. Makes sense for CSV and TSV formats that may contain multiple translations in one file.
The required text processing mode.
member.returns: A instance or if the parser could not be selected or if the parser failed to load the translation.
member.exception: and its descendants are thrown if parsing fails due to errors in format of the input.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.LoadTranslation(System.String,Tlumach.Base.BaseParser,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Nullable{Tlumach.Base.TextFormat})
member.summary: Loads the translation from the given text using the specified parser.
member.param: The text to load the translation from.
The parser to use for parsing the text.
An optional reference to the locale, whose translation is to be loaded. Makes sense for CSV and TSV formats that may contain multiple translations in one file.
The required text processing mode.
member.returns: A instance or if the parser failed to load the translation.
member.exception: and its descendants are thrown if parsing fails due to errors in format of the input.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.LoadTranslation(System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Locates and loads the translation.
member.param: The culture, for which the translation is needed.
member.returns: A instance or if a translation could not be loaded.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.DropTranslation(System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: "Forgets" the translation for the given culture so that upon the next attempt to access it, the translation gets loaded again.
member.param: The culture, whose translation should be dropped.

summary.para: "Forgets" all translation so that upon the next attempt to access any translation, they get loaded again.
The method is useful when it is necessary to rescan translations updated on the disk or in another storage.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.GetTranslation(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the translation object for the given culture if one exists. Optionally tries to load a missing translation.
member.param: The culture to retrieve the translation for.
member.returns: The instance if one was found and otherwise or if was .

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.ListCulturesInConfiguration
member.summary: Lists culture names listed in the configuration file, if one was used.
member.returns: The list of culture names (every name is contained in uppercase).

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.GetValue(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the value based on the default configuration and culture.
member.param: The key of the translation entry to retrieve.
member.returns: The translation entry or an empty entry if nothing was found.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.GetValue(System.String,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Retrieves the value based on the default configuration and culture.
member.param: The key of the translation entry to retrieve.
The culture, for which the entry is needed.
member.returns: The translation entry or an empty entry if nothing was found.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.GetValue(Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration,System.String,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Retrieves the value based on the default configuration and culture.
member.param: The configuration that specifies from where to load translations.
The key of the translation entry to retrieve.
The culture, for which the entry is needed.
member.returns: The translation entry or an empty entry if nothing was found.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.GetValue(Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration,System.String,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Retrieves the value based on the default configuration and culture.
member.param: The configuration that specifies from where to load translations.
The key of the translation entry to retrieve.
The culture, for which the entry is needed.
Upon return, indicates if the requested entry was found for the speciifed culture or its base culture. will be returned if a value from the default translation was used.
member.returns: The translation entry or an empty entry if nothing was found.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.ListTranslationFiles(System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String)

summary.para: Scans the assembly and optionally a disk directory for translation files.

This method can recognize only the files with names that have the {base_name}_{locale-name}[.{supported_extension}] format, where 'locale-name' may be either language name (e.g., "en") or locale name (e.g., "en-US").
The "_" character (underscore) is defined in the LocaleSeparatorChar property of the parser classes and can be replaced by another character if needed.

member.param: An optional assembly to look for translations.
The base name of the file to look for. If it contains a recognized extension, the extension is stripped.
member.returns: The list of filenames of files found in the corresponding directory.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.InternalLoadTranslation(Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Loads a translation from a file.
member.param: Configuration information to use (contains an optional reference to the assembly and the filename(s).
The desired locale for which the file is needed.
Whether the default file should be tried.
member.returns: A translation if one was found and loaded and otherwise.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.InternalLoadFileContent(System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String,System.String,System.String@,System.String)
member.summary: Loads content of the file.
member.param: An optional assembly where the file should be looked for.
The filename to load the data from.
An optional path to the file. If set, the value is used only when opening based on the filename alone did not succeed.
Becomes set to the filename actually used if loading was successful. This filename may contain a path if loading was performed from the disk.
An optional reference to the file, from which the translation was loaded.
member.returns: File content if the file was found and loaded and otherwise.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.TranslationEntryAcceptable(Tlumach.Base.TranslationEntry,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.String,System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether the entry is usable.
member.param: The entry to check.
The culture, for which the entry was found.
The key, for which the entry was found.
An optional reference to the assembly, from which the translation was loaded.
An optional reference to the file, from which the translation was loaded.
An optional hint path, taken from the configuration.
member.returns: if the entry is usable and otherwise.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationManager.SystemCultureUpdated
member.summary: This method should be called when a change of the system culture is detected, so that IF the default culture of the TranslationManager is set to , the manager can notify listeners about the change.

summary.para: Represents a unit of translation - a unit of text (a word, a phrase, a sentence, etc.) in a translation accessible using a unique key.
This class is used in generated code except when using Avalonia, WinUI or UWP (those have own TranslationUnit classes in the corresponding assemblies).

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationUnit.CacheValues
member.summary: Gets or sets the indicator that tells the class that it may cache the string values without going for them to TranslationManager every time.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationUnit.CurrentValue
member.summary: Gets the value of the unit according to the current culture set in the associated translation manager.

member.name: E:Tlumach.TranslationUnit.OnChange
member.summary:
Fires when the method is called to notify listeners (mostly, XAML bindings) that they need to update.
Does not fire when the culture of the translation manager referenced by the property changes. If an application needs, it can subscribe to the event.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationUnit.#ctor(Tlumach.TranslationManager,Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
For internal use. This constructor is used by .
member.param: The translation manager to which the unit is bound.
The translation configuration used to create the unit.
An indicator of whether the unit contains placeholders.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationUnit.#ctor(Tlumach.TranslationManager,Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
For internal use. This constructor is used by the code generated by Generator.
member.param: The translation manager to which the unit is bound.
The translation configuration used to create the unit.
The key of the unit.
An indicator of whether the unit contains placeholders.

member.name: M:Tlumach.TranslationUnit.NotifyPlaceholdersUpdated
member.summary: Notifies XAML bindings that they need to request a new value and update the controls.

member.name: T:Tlumach.TranslationValueEventArgs
member.summary: Contains the arguments of the TranslationValueNeeded, TranslationValueFound, and TranslationValueNotFound events.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationValueEventArgs.Culture
member.summary: Gets a reference to the culture, for which the text is needed.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationValueEventArgs.Key
member.summary: Gets the key of the requested translation entry.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationValueEventArgs.Text
member.summary: Should be set to the text value that corresponds to the specified Key and Culture; alternatively, or may be set.

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationValueEventArgs.EscapedText
member.summary: May be set to the escaped text value that corresponds to the specified Key and Culture; alternatively, Entry may be set. This parameter may be set instead of , in which case, it will be un-escaped and also will be used during template processing (if required).

member.name: P:Tlumach.TranslationValueEventArgs.Entry
member.summary: May be set to the instance of the TranslationEntry class that corresponds to the specified Key and Culture and contains the requested text; alternatively, Text may be set.

member.name: T:Tlumach.UntranslatedUnit
member.summary: This class can be used to present some application-provided string in situations where a TranslationUnit is required.

member.name: P:Tlumach.UntranslatedUnit.SourceValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the string value that this translation unit exposes.

member.name: M:Tlumach.UntranslatedUnit.#ctor(System.String,Tlumach.TranslationManager,Tlumach.Base.TranslationConfiguration,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The string value to return.
A reference to some instance of . It can be any instance - it is not used by the class.
A reference to an instance of . If is , this configuration's TextProcessingMode is used to process the .
Specifies whether contains placeholders and should be processed accordingly.

member.name: T:Tlumach.XamlTranslateCore
member.summary: An internal class used in XAML integrations.
